type.description: One of: string, date, datetime, integer, decimal, boolean, uri, or concept:{ConceptId}

domain_override.description: Explicit domain namespace override. Set to null to force universal URI, or to a domain code (e.g. 'sp') to force domain-specific URI, regardless of which concepts use this property.

schema_org_equivalent.description: schema.org equivalent property as a CURIE (e.g. 'schema:givenName'). Used to generate camelCase aliases in the JSON-LD context.

data_classification.description: Data classification for privacy and disclosure guidance. non_personal: structural/program metadata that does not identify or relate to a natural person. personal: identifies, relates to, or resolves to a natural person (includes person references, person-specific record references, and group composition data). special_category: data whose value is inherently sensitive (individual assessment scores, vulnerability indices). Program-level parameters like scoring methods or cutoff thresholds are non_personal, not special_category.
